title: The Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Act, 1971
full_text: The Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Act, 1971 सरकारी स्‍थान (अप्राधिकृत अधिभोगियों की बेदखली)अधिनियम,1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-40 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 1971-08-23 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Act, 1971 Hindi Title: सरकारी स्‍थान (अप्राधिकृत अधिभोगियों की बेदखली)अधिनियम,1971 Long Title: An Act to provide for the eviction of unauthorised occupants from public premises and for certain incidental matters. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 16-09-1958 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Public Premises (Eviction of Unauthorised Occupants) Act, 1971 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Appointment of estate officers. Show Related Subordinates Section 3A. Eviction from temporary occupation. Section 3B. Eviction from residential accommodation Section 4. Issue of notice to show cause against order of eviction. Section 5. Eviction of unauthorised occupants. Section 5A. Power to remove unauthorised constructions, etc. Section 5B. Order of demolition of unauthorised construction. Section 5C. Power to seal unauthorised constructions. Section 6. Disposal of property left on public premises by unauthorised occupants. Section 7. Power to require payment of rent or damages in respect of public premises. Section 8. Powers of estate officers. Section 9. Appeals. Section 10. Finality of orders. Section 11. Offences and penalty. Section 11A. Offences under section 11 to be cognizable. Section 12. Power to obtain information. Section 13. Liability of heirs and legal representatives. Section 14. Recovery of rent, etc., as an arrear of land revenue. Section 15. Bar of jurisdiction. Section 16. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 17. Delegation of powers. Section 18. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 19. Repeal. Section 20. Validation.
